diagrams.title: RPC Architecture - Five Layer Model
diagrams.description: Shows the complete flow of RPC from client application to server application with all five layers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete RPC data flow and layer responsibilities

diagrams.title: Client-Server Stub Interaction
diagrams.description: Detailed view of how stubs communicate and transform data for network transmission
diagrams.purpose: Understanding stub functionality and data transformation process

diagrams.title: RPC Binding Process
diagrams.description: Shows how client locates and binds to server using directory service
diagrams.purpose: Understanding dynamic server discovery and connection establishment

diagrams.title: RPC Semantics Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of maybe-once, at-least-once, and at-most-once execution semantics
diagrams.purpose: Understanding different reliability guarantees in RPC implementations

visuals.title: Remote Procedure Call
visuals.description: Visual diagram for remote procedure call
